error_signature: Callback verification failed with the following errors: HTTP Status Code = 408
title: WhatsApp Trigger callback verification failed
symptom: When verifying the webhook for the WhatsApp Trigger node, n8n returns a 'Callback verification failed' error with a 408 status code, indicating a request timeout.
not_this_if: n8n is not hosted on a virtual machine
root_cause: The error occurs because the firewall settings on the virtual machine are blocking incoming requests to the necessary ports for webhook verification. Without access to these ports, the verification process cannot complete successfully.
fix_steps: Access the firewall settings of your virtual machine
Create rules to allow incoming traffic on ports 5678, 443, and 80
Save the changes and retry the webhook verification
agent_instruction: Create firewall rules to allow access to ports 5678, 443, and 80 on your virtual machine.
